title: Unrealistically Real
description: Experience Minecraft like never before with this ultra-realistic modpack!
body:
Archived - Dear fellow players, 8 months have passed since the realese of this Modpack, and many things have changed since then. Better texture packs, mods etc. that make the game even better! You can still download the Modpack, but it wont receive any updates. Thank you for your support.

## It's not Real... It's Unreal.

Step into a Minecraft experience that **blurs the line between reality and the fantastic**. With the Unrealistically Real Modpack, you’ll witness Minecraft in a way that feels both lifelike and otherworldly, as if nature itself has been given a digital twist. Every mod has been carefully selected and modified to bring both the familiar and the unearthly together, delivering an experience that’s not just real—it’s unreal.

What Makes It Unreal? This modpack combines 30 top-tier mods, shaders and textures that overhaul the game’s core aspects with layers of realism:

- **Realistic Player Animations**, achieved with Not Enough Animations Mod.
- **64x Textures** with the Faithfull 64x Texture Pack!
- Bliss Shaders for having a **great fog and shadows**.
- While having **128 to 256 chunks** rendered with the help of the Bobby Mod!

Before you download this, you should know that you need at least 16GB of Ram, a mid-ranged GPU and CPU so that Shaders, Chunks and Textures can be rendered corectly! If you can't run this, try disabling the Shader or the Texture Pack, or even lowering down the Render Distance.

<details>
<summary>Pictures</summary>

![Render Distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7be85dfef6fd5ddb00108125dc1cacfcab1bfe8.jpeg)
![Realism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f150ff6c7bead600abf62629b79a51e492d8f61.jpeg)

</details>

Discover the Unreal With the Unreal Realism Modpack, Minecraft’s iconic blocky world evolves into an experience where every detail feels almost tangible, yet dreamlike—a digital reimagining of nature that’s as stunning as it is surreal.
